Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /greenzone to open the window.
Changelog:
Weekly reset timing:
- Moves the weekly GC seals reset and progress timer to Monday 9am AEST.
- Reorders the daily GC seals activity buckets to run Monday through Sunday.
- Updates Lodestone weekly standings timing to the Monday 6pm AEST publish window.
